issues.description: Target should be limited to [Kalgara] cards only. Current target 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' allows any character/leader. Should use a filtered target like 'ChooseOwnCharacterByType' or similar with Kalgara filter.
Effect says 'Up to 1' but target scope doesn't enforce the quantity limit. Target selection must be constrained to maximum 1 card.
